questionHtml: Draw and label on Figure 1 a curve that illustrates the price floor in Nissos that leads to a monthly surplus of 3 million kg of corn.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for a horizontal line above the equilibrium price.

Award [1] for the line being drawn at $10.

If the line is not labelled a maximum of [1] may be awarded.

OFR applies.

meta.title: Draw and label on Figure 1 a curve that illustrates the price floor in Nissos that leads to a monthly surplus of 3 million kg of corn.
breadcrumbLabels: Price floors (minimum prices): rationale, consequences and examples
